history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, styled hair takes a mirror selfie in what appears to be a clothing store fitting room. He is wearing a light grey crewneck sweatshirt with white Japanese text on the front, and matching light grey sweatpants. His left hand is behind his head, and his right hand holds up a black smartphone to take the photo. The background is a mix of retail elements: a large, dark brown curtain hangs to his right, and a white wall with a light fixture and a reflective surface (likely a mirror or another display) is visible to his left. In the reflected background, there are clothing racks and displays, suggesting a casual retail environment. The lighting is bright and even, typical of store lighting. The overall color palette is dominated by greys, browns, and white, creating a clean and casual aesthetic. The mood is relaxed and youthful, with a hint of self-consciousness as he poses for the selfie.
